sources: public tuning case criticalGoals/nonCriticalGoals/profile vocabulary for the two scoped intents
selectionMethod.normalization: lowercase; non [a-z0-9.+#/-] to spaces; collapse whitespace
selectionMethod.poolRule: For each query family, rank all matching skills by descending integer score and stable skill ID tie-break; take the union of the top 40 per family. Scores sum the first matching field weight for each term.
selectionMethod.semanticReviewRule: Inspect selected SKILL.md content and retain only candidates with at least one capability explicitly supported by the reviewed sections. Emit only capability names present in the public two-intent tuning vocabulary; do not infer missing metadata from prose.
selectionMethod.notAWhitelist: Eligibility is not asserted here. This is an evidence audit artifact; final recommendation eligibility remains policy/metadata-derived.
